title: 有翼之暗
summary:
McCarty Eel, a private detective from Osaka known for solving the North Kii Arson Murder Case, arrives at the mansion. Koumatsu, identifying himself as a friend of Wakaba, observes McCarty’s detached demeanor and suspects he may be of Slavic descent. Detective Torizuka confirms McCarty's reputation as a capable but eccentric character who is highly selective regarding his cases. Amidst the tension caused by the absence of Matsukaze and the high intelligence of the killer, McCarty is viewed as a potential source of hope.

Toriumi reports the autopsy results for Otomo (Tōshi Mori), revealing that he died approximately thirty days ago from chronic arsenic poisoning rather than natural causes. The report notes that Mochizuki's head was severed three days after Tōshi Mori's death, likely inside the coffin, which explains the lack of fingerprints. The police chief concludes that the murderer meticulously planned the crime a month in advance. Additionally, Mochizuki's lawyer, Downs, reveals that the will distributed the inheritance equally among relatives, contradicting Wakizashi's previous theory. Following this report, Jinguji expresses a desire to meet McCarty.

Koumatsu visits Yuzu, who remains in a state of grief and aloofness. Although she maintains a composed voice, she admits she is not feeling better. Koumatsu observes that Yuzu possesses feelings for Kyousuke that exceed sibling affection. When asked if she likes Kei Maru, Yuzu answers affirmatively while staring at a Van Gogh painting.
